name: Mouse Acquisition and Baseline Qualification
preprompt: Define how male C57BL/6J mice are sourced, aged to 12 months, acclimated, and screened before randomization. Include housing conditions, health criteria, baseline measurements, and any exclusions prior to treatment start.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Establishes the eligible cohort and baseline conditions before intervention begins. Ensures mice are healthy, age-matched, and ready for randomized assignment at 12 months.
